title: Determine the exact value of R(K3, K4, K4)
lean_gate_reason: Lean is not the shortest remaining path because the verified outcome is a rediscovered lower-bound witness caused by packet/source drift, not a frontier claim awaiting formal sealing.
micro_paper_assessment: Fails the micro-paper lane for this run. The packet miscopied a K4-e source as K4, and the verified K22 witness only reproduces a lower bound already implied by published literature.
family_affinity: compact lower-bound constructions for small multicolor clique Ramsey numbers
generalization_signal: parity-split red bipartite layer plus complementary circulant K4-free graphs on each side is a reusable template, though only one instance is currently established
strongest_honest_claim: The written K22 circulant construction is a valid witness that R(K3,K4,K4) >= 23, but that claim is already subsumed by the published 2021 appendix bound 55 <= R(K3,K4,K4) <= 77; the packet's 21/22 frontier came from miscopying a K4-e theorem.
candidate_theorem_slice: Rediscovered only: there exists a circulant 3-coloring of K_22 with no red K3, no blue K4, and no green K4.
